description.content: Decoded domestic AIRMETs (Alaska only). See /api/data/gairmet for similar advisories over the contiguous United States.
Traffic Flow Management (TFM) Convective Forecast. See https://aviationweather.gov/tcf/ for more information.
Center Weather Advisories issued by NWS Center Weather Service Units (CWSUs)

item.name: Get Wind and Temperature Point Data

request.name: Get Wind and Temperature Point Data

description.content: Wind and temperature information from the legacy FD winds

query.description:
Region:
 * `us` - All contiguous US sites
 * `bos` - Northeast
 * `mia` - Southeast
 * `chi` - North central
 * `dfw` - South central
 * `slc` - Rocky Mountain
 * `sfo` - Pacific Coast
 * `alaska` - Alaska
 * `hawaii` - Hawaii
 * `other_pac` - Western Pacific

description.content: Text Area Forecasts for the United States outside the contiguous states (Alaska)

query.description:
(Required) Date
 * `aknorth` - Northern half of Alaska
 * `akcentral` - Interior Alaska
 * `aksouth` - Southcentral Alaska
 * `aksouthwest` - Alaska Peninsula
 * `aksoutheast` - Eastern Gulf of Alaska
 * `akpanhandle` - Alaska

description.content: Aviation Forecast Discussions issued by NWS Weather Forecast Offices. Returns aviation section or full discussion issued within the past six hours.

query.description:
Type of output:
 * `afd` - aviation discussion
 * `af` - full discussion

description.content: Meteorological Information Statements issued by NWS Center Weather Service Units (CWSU)
Compatibility layer with previous Text Data Service. Station identifiers or a bounding box, as well as a time selection, are required.

query.description: Geographic bounding box (lat0, lon0, lat1, lon1)
Number of hours before now to search
Output format (TAFs not available in CSV format)
Most recent per station (METARs and TAFs only)
Circular bounds defined by latitude, longitude and radial distance in statute miles (PIREPS only)

description.content:
Schema for the public data API of AviationWeather.gov, operated by the NOAA/NWS
Aviation Weather Center (AWC). Provides machine-to-machine access to operational
aviation weather products including METARs, TAFs, PIREPs, SIGMETs, AIRMETs,
G-AIRMETs, CWAs, TFM convective forecasts, area forecasts, forecast discussions,
meteorological information statements, and reference data for stations, airports,
NAVAIDs, fixes, features, and obstacles.

Rate limit: 100 requests per minute per user. Most endpoints return a maximum of
400 entries. Historical depth is up to 15 days. No API key required.

Contact Support:
 Name: NOAA / NWS Aviation Weather Center
